product_overview: MedQueue AI is a patient-facing frontend that enables one-click emergency SOS dispatch, searchable hospital/doctor token booking, AI-assisted symptom triage, and downloadable professional booking receipts. It integrates authentication and local booking persistence with a modern React + TypeScript UI.
core_goals: Provide a one-click Emergency SOS flow that locates the user and dispatches help with ETA feedback.
Allow authenticated patients to search hospitals, select doctors/departments, and book tokens quickly.
Generate professional downloadable PDF receipts for patient bookings from the dashboard.
Offer an AI-powered symptom checker (neural triage) to provide preliminary guidance to users.
Ensure smooth auth flows and clear error/validation handling; persist bookings client-side with clear limitations noted.

features.name: Emergency SOS
features.description: One-click emergency help from the landing page that requests location, dispatches assistance, shows ETA, and allows cancellation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Emergency Help button -> Grant GPS permission -> Wait for GPS location -> See ambulance dispatched with ETA -> Receive confirmation message
Navigate to / -> Click Emergency Help button -> Deny GPS permission -> See error message requesting GPS access -> Offer manual location input
Navigate to / -> Click Emergency Help button -> Grant GPS permission -> Wait for GPS location -> Click Cancel Alert -> See alert canceled confirmation

features.name: Token Booking
features.description: Search hospitals and book tokens for doctors from the patient hospital search and booking pages (requires patient authentication).
user_flows: Navigate to /patient -> If unauthenticated redirect to /auth/patient -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See /patient

Navigate to /patient -> Search for hospital 'General Hospital' -> Select hospital board 'General Hospital - Main' -> Choose doctor department 'Cardiology' -> Click Continue to /book -> Fill patient details -> Click Book Token -> See booking confirmation and token number

Navigate to /patient -> Search for hospital 'Small Clinic' -> Select hospital board -> Choose doctor department -> Fill incomplete patient details -> Click Book Token -> See validation error message indicating missing fields

Navigate to /patient -> Search for hospital 'X' -> Select hospital board -> Choose doctor department -> Click Book Token when no slots available -> See out-of-availability message and suggestion to join waitlist or try another slot

features.name: Patient Receipt (PDF Download)
features.description: From the patient dashboard, view active booking details and download a professional PDF receipt generated client-side.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See active booking details displayed -> Click Download Receipt button -> Browser generates PDF using jsPDF -> Download starts and user receives professional PDF file

Navigate to /dashboard -> See active booking details displayed -> Click Download Receipt button -> PDF generation fails due to runtime error -> See error toast 'Unable to generate receipt, please try again'
Navigate to /dashboard -> No active booking present -> Click Download Receipt button -> See disabled button or message 'No active booking to download'

features.name: AI Symptom Checker (Neural Triage)
features.description: AI-powered symptom input that provides triage recommendations and next-step guidance on the symptom checker page.
user_flows: Navigate to /symptoms -> Enter symptoms in input field -> Click Run Check button -> Wait for AI triage result -> See recommended care level and guidance
Navigate to /symptoms -> Leave symptom input empty -> Click Run Check button -> See validation error 'Please describe your symptoms'
Navigate to /symptoms -> Enter symptoms -> Click Run Check button -> AI service times out or returns error -> See friendly error message and retry option

routes.description: User ticket monitoring and receipt download

features.name: Emergency SOS
features.description: One-click hospital dispatch system on landing page

features.name: Token Booking
